name: Qref
description: Compressor reference inlet actual volumetric flow for scaled curve

name: Head
description: Compressor mass based adiabatic head (Out - In)

name: HeadPol
description: Compressor mass based polytropic head (Out - In)

name: HeadRef
description: Compressor reference head for scaled curve

name: Power
description: Compressor work applied to fluid (excludes mechanical losses)

name: Wadcalc
description: Compressor adiabatic work using constant isentropic coefficient

name: FlowScale
description: Compressor scale factor for flow.\nThis variable will stretch the Flow vs. Head and Flow vs. Efficiency curves along the flow axis.

name: HeadScale
description: Compressor scale factor for head.\nThis variable will stretch the Flow vs. Head curve along the Head axis.

name: etaScale
description: Compressor scale factor for efficiency.\nThis variable will stretch the Flow vs Efficiency curve along the Efficiency axis.

name: gcf
description: Compressor Gas Compressibility Factor at inlet conditions

name: CpCv
description: Compressor ideal gas heat capacity ratio at inlet conditions

name: a
description: Compressor acoustic velocity at inlet conditions
